channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped child's car seat and four/five bags of rubbish, 19th March
item.description:
A child's car seat and four or five large bags of rubbish have been dumped today on the pavement on the boundary between The Limes Close and Arnos Court on The Limes Avenue. Stuff keeps get dumped here - I think from Arnos Court but I never see who leaves it. It needs clearing up as lots of people walk along here to the primary school.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Limes Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollards not lit, 19th March
item.description:
Both bollards and the lamp column on the island at the end of Crossway are not lit at night.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big tree branches have fallen off into the front garden, 19th March
item.description:
Big tree overhanging the property - previously reported to Bromley council and contractors attended but this has not been addressed the issue is still ongoing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hackington Crescent, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping suitcase, 19th March
item.description:
Fly tipping suitcase left outside St Olaves, been there since Wednesday 18th March

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parkview Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Concrete/cement poured down drain, 19th March
item.description:
Workmen have poured cement/concrete down public drain

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parkview Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: X2 medium potholes opposite No.9 Cameron Road and near entrance to Stone Road., 19th March
item.description:
X2 medium potholes opposite No.9 Cameron Road and near entrance to Stone Road. These have been getting bigger recently. This section of road is part of a 2 route bus route, so therefore heavy traffic goes over this area making the pothole bigger in a short space of time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Cameron Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking post dumped on road, 19th March
item.description:
This was not cleared away. Please remove this as it is now in the road. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Taplow Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 19th March
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kidbrooke Park Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A carboard tv box on pavement, 19th March
item.description:
A cardboard box large on dumped on a vent please remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering - chicken bones - dump site, 19th March
item.description:
There has been an increased of littering on Hatcliffe street. People are illegally parking and chucking their rubbish out of cars. There has been 20 different chicken boxes on the street in the last two weeks. Choking hazard for dogs and birds. Escapically an issues in front of sunmer house
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hatcliffe Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road cracking and long wide potholes, 19th March
item.description:
These potholes have been there for around 6 months plus, have been reported several times by many people, this damaged road is a hazard and has the potential to be the cause of serious accidents, especially as of a night time none of the street/road lights are even on. The road is the slip road off eastern way coming up onto the flyerover. I think it is appalling that this has not been dealt with long before now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Disraeli Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 19th March
item.description:
Outside 34 Tavistock Terrace
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Tavistock Terrace, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pavers have been cracked and broken again, 19th March
item.description:
A car or a van has driven onto the pavers and cracked them. I think it must have happened today as I didn't notice them this morning. They are about 3-4 cm raised and a trip hazard. A delivery driver has already tripped on it. We have suggested a post being put in there previously as this has happened several times.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albatross Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Half a sign missing, 19th March
item.description:
Please replace. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Thorndon Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 9 Large 30-50 Centimeter pot holes throughout the whole road, 19th March
item.description:
Multiple large potholes from the top, and all the way to the bottom of Cray Valley Road. Please review the entire length of the road to see them all.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53,55, Cray Valley Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 19th March
item.description:
Graffiti on black fence

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box of Gas Canisters in a Bag, 19th March
item.description:
Dumped on Charmouth Road not far from Tavistock Road junction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charmouth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Really long grass!!!, 19th March
item.description:
Hi, I’d like to report the very long grass next to 1 Compton Place. I’ve just come back from the gym and a rat literally jumped at me - I’m writing this shaking and crying omg The grass is extremely overgrown and clearly needs cutting as soon as possible pleaseeeee. It feels unsafe and unpleasant to walk past :( Please could this be addressed urgently? Thank you, Elisabeth
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Manor Road, North End, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car - badly parked and untaxed, 19th March
item.description:
This car has been here for over a month, it looks like it has been in a collision as the air bag has blown. It’s sticking out in the road slightly making it hard for cars to pass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Wren Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on green, 19th March
item.description:
Please check and remove. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 241, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
